void.string: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <wsdl:definitions targetNamespace="http://www.fiorano.com/services/serviceName" xmlns="http://www.fiorano.com/services/serviceName" xmlns:jms="http://www.w3.org/2010/soapjms/" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:mime="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/mime/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:wsdlsoap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:fesb1="http://www.fiorano.com/MB/CPBank" xmlns:wsdlsoap12="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap12/"> <wsdl:types> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="FTBAKONGACCResponse"> <wsdl:part name="Response" type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="FTFASTRequest"> <wsdl:part name="Request" type="xsd:string"> type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="ExchangeRateResponse"> <wsdl:part name="Response" type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="FundTransferRequest"> <wsdl:part name="Request" type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="FTKoicaPhoneRequest"> <wsdl:part name="Request" type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="FTSwiftResponse"> <wsdl:part name="Response" type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="BillpaymentTransferRequest"> type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="InterestRateResponse"> <wsdl:part name="Response" type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="GetAccountInfoResponse"> <wsdl:part name="Response" type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="GetAccountListRequest"> <wsdl:part name="Request" type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="GetAccountListResponse"> <wsdl:part name="Response" type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="GetAccountStmtResponse"> <wsdl:part name="Response" type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="OpenCIFRequest"> <wsdl:part name="Request" type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="OpenCIFResponse"> <wsdl:part name="Response" type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="FTNCSRequest"> <wsdl:part name="Request" type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="RefundTopupTransferResponse"> <wsdl:part name="Response" type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="exportstatementResponse"> <wsdl:part name="Response" type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="FundTransferResponse"> <wsdl:part name="Response" type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="FTSwiftRequest"> <wsdl:part name="Request" type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="FTFASTResponse"> <wsdl:part name="Response" type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="FTNCSResponse"> <wsdl:part name="Response" type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="LoanSchedeuleResponse"> <wsdl:part name="Response" type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="GetAccountStmtRequest"> <wsdl:part name="Request" type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="FTBakongWalletResponse"> <wsdl:part name="Response" type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="FTKoicaAccResponse"> <wsdl:part name="Request" type="xsd:string"> </wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="MobileBankingPortType"> <wsdl:operation name="GetCustomerInfo"> <wsdl:input name="GetCustomerInfoInput" message="GetCustomerInfoRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="GetCustomerInfoOutput" message="GetCustomerInfoResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetAccountInfo"> <wsdl:input name="GetAccountInfoInput" message="GetAccountInfoRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="GetAccountInfoOutput" message="GetAccountInfoResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetAccountList"> <wsdl:input name="GetAccountListInput" message="GetAccountListRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="GetAccountListOutput" message="GetAccountListResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetAccountStmt"> <wsdl:input name="GetAccountStmtInput" message="GetAccountStmtRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="GetAccountStmtOutput" message="GetAccountStmtResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="FundTransfer"> <wsdl:input name="FundTransferInput" message="FundTransferRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="FundTransferOutput" message="FundTransferResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="TopupTransfer"> <wsdl:input name="TopupTransferInput" message="TopupTransferRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="TopupTransferOutput" message="TopupTransferResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="RefundTopupTransfer"> <wsdl:input name="RefundTopupTransferInput" message="RefundTopupTransferRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="RefundTopupTransferOutput" message="RefundTopupTransferResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="ExchangeRate"> <wsdl:input name="ExchangeRateInput" message="ExchangeRateRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="ExchangeRateOutput" message="ExchangeRateResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="InterestRate"> <wsdl:input name="InterestRateInput" message="InterestRateRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="InterestRateOutput" message="InterestRateResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="AnnualFee"> <wsdl:input name="AnnualFeeInput" message="AnnualFeeRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="AnnualFeeOutput" message="AnnualFeeResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="BillpaymentTransfer"> <wsdl:input name="BillpaymentTransferInput" message="BillpaymentTransferRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="BillpaymentTransferOutput" message="BillpaymentTransferResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="FTFAST"> <wsdl:input name="FTFASTInput" message="FTFASTRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="FTFASTOutput" message="FTFASTResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="FTBAKONGACC"> <wsdl:input name="FTBAKONGACCInput" message="FTBAKONGACCRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="FTBAKONGACCOutput" message="FTBAKONGACCResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="FTBakongWallet"> <wsdl:input name="FTBakongWalletInput" message="FTBakongWalletRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="FTBakongWalletOutput" message="FTBakongWalletResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="FTKoicaAcc"> <wsdl:input name="FTKoicaAccInput" message="FTKoicaAccRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="FTKoicaAccOutput" message="FTKoicaAccResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="FTKoicaPhone"> <wsdl:input name="FTKoicaPhoneInput" message="FTKoicaPhoneRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="FTKoicaPhoneOutput" message="FTKoicaPhoneResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="OpenFD"> <wsdl:input name="OpenFDInput" message="OpenFDRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="OpenFDOutput" message="OpenFDResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="OpenAccount"> <wsdl:input name="OpenAccountInput" message="OpenAccountRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="OpenAccountOutput" message="OpenAccountResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="OpenCIF"> <wsdl:input name="OpenCIFInput" message="OpenCIFRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="OpenCIFOutput" message="OpenCIFResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetLegalID"> <wsdl:input name="GetLegalIDInput" message="GetLegalIDRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="GetLegalIDOutput" message="GetLegalIDResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="exportstatement"> <wsdl:input name="exportstatementInput" message="exportstatementRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="exportstatementOutput" message="exportstatementResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="FTSwift"> <wsdl:input name="FTSwiftInput" message="FTSwiftRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="FTSwiftOutput" message="FTSwiftResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="FTNCS"> <wsdl:input name="FTNCSInput" message="FTNCSRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="FTNCSOutput" message="FTNCSResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="LoanSchedeule"> <wsdl:input name="LoanSchedeuleInput" message="LoanSchedeuleRequest"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="LoanSchedeuleOutput" message="LoanSchedeuleResponse"> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="MobileBankingBinding" type="MobileBankingPortType"> <wsdlsoap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="GetCustomerInfo"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction="GetCustomerInfo" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="GetCustomerInfoInput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="GetCustomerInfoOutput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetAccountInfo"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction="GetAccountInfo" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="GetAccountInfoInput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="GetAccountInfoOutput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetAccountList"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction="GetAccountList" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="GetAccountListInput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="GetAccountListOutput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetAccountStmt"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction="GetAccountStmt" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="GetAccountStmtInput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="GetAccountStmtOutput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="FundTransfer"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction="FundTransfer" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="FundTransferInput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="FundTransferOutput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="TopupTransfer"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction="TopupTransfer" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="TopupTransferInput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="TopupTransferOutput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="RefundTopupTransfer"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction="RefundTopupTransfer" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="RefundTopupTransferInput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="RefundTopupTransferOutput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="ExchangeRate"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction="ExchangeRate" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="ExchangeRateInput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="ExchangeRateOutput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="InterestRate"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction="InterestRate" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="InterestRateInput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="InterestRateOutput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="AnnualFee"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction="AnnualFee" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="AnnualFeeInput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="AnnualFeeOutput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="BillpaymentTransfer"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction="BillpaymentTransfer" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="BillpaymentTransferInput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="BillpaymentTransferOutput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="FTFAST"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction="FTFAST" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="FTFASTInput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="FTFASTOutput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="FTBAKONGACC"> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="FTBAKONGACCOutput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="FTBakongWallet"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction="FTBakongWallet" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="FTBakongWalletInput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="FTBakongWalletOutput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="FTKoicaAcc"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction="FTKoicaAcc" style="document"/> use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="FTKoicaPhone"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction="FTKoicaPhone" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="FTKoicaPhoneInput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="FTKoicaPhoneOutput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="OpenFD"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction="OpenFD" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="OpenFDInput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="OpenFDOutput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="OpenAccount"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction="OpenAccount" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="OpenAccountInput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="OpenAccountOutput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="OpenCIF"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction="OpenCIF" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="OpenCIFInput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="OpenCIFOutput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="GetLegalID"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction="GetLegalID" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="GetLegalIDInput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="GetLegalIDOutput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="exportstatement"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction="exportstatement" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="exportstatementInput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="exportstatementOutput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="FTSwift"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction="FTSwift" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="FTSwiftInput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="FTSwiftOutput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="FTNCS"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction="FTNCS" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="FTNCSInput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="FTNCSOutput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="LoanSchedeule"> <wsdlsoap:operation soapAction="LoanSchedeule" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="LoanSchedeuleInput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="LoanSchedeuleOutput"> <wsdlsoap:body use="literal" encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="Mobilebanking"> <wsdl:port name="MobileBankingPortType" binding="MobileBankingBinding"> <wsdlsoap:address location="http://192.168.1.30:1880/bcwsgateway/services/MobileBanking"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>
